Within the 5-minute sourcing time box, further retries were not attempted. Menu is therefore PARTIAL, not the full restaurant menu.

manual_review_reason: Menu is confirmed genuine and location-matched (The Bao is a distinct, real, currently-operating Chinese/dim-sum restaurant at 13 St Marks Pl, separate from Spot Dessert Bar at the same building), but only a partial menu (12 of an estimated 60+ items across 9 unlisted categories) was captured before a browser session conflict interrupted further sourcing within the time box. Recommend a follow-up pass to capture the remaining Grubhub categories (Small Dishes, Dim Sum, Rice/Noodles, Soup, Hot Dishes, Vegetable, Lunch Specials, Soda) or to OCR the official site's menu images.
